info.title: Flipdish API - Marketing
info.description: Flipdish Open API v1.0 — Marketing operations. Flipdish is an online ordering and branded-app platform for restaurants and takeaways. This specification was derived from the official Flipdish Swagger document and grouped by resource domain.

tags.name: RestaurantVouchersPayGreen

VouchersIssued.description:
Deprecated. Number of issued vouchers.
This field is always zero.

VouchersRedeemed.description:
Deprecated. Number of redeemed vouchers. This field is always zero.
This field is always zero.

Conversion.description:
Deprecated. Conversion of campaign (VouchersIssued / VouchersRedeemed).
This field is always zero.

SalesGenerated.description:
Deprecated.
Sales generated by campaign (TotalAmount - FeeChargedToCustomer ie. the discounted sale value).
This field is always zero.

ReturnOfInvestment.description:
Deprecated.
Return of investment of campaign (TotalAmount / DiscountAmount).
This field is always zero.

Stores.description: Stores that this voucher applies to

ValidOnOrdersOver.description: Valid on orders on or above

IsValidForOrdersPayedByCash.description: Valid for orders payed in cash

IsValidForFirstOrderOnly.description: Valid only on the first order by the customer

IsValidOnlyOnce.description: Valid only once, by any customer (once used cannot be used again by any other customer)

IsDiscoverable.description: Enables the voucher to be offered in the Voucher Discoverability feature

ForceDiscount.description: Force the discount to be applied which bypasses some menu restrictions

ChannelRestrictions.description: Limit the channels this voucher can be used on

ValidityPeriods.description:
Periods in which the voucher is valid.
An empty list means the voucher is valid at all times.
When updating the voucher, if this is set to null, the validity periods won't be updated.

MaxRedemptions.description: Maximum number of times the voucher can be redeemed (used)

FlipdishError.description: Standard Flipdish API error response. Errors are returned as a JSON object with a human-readable message and a programmatic error code (see https://developers.flipdish.com/docs/error-handling).

errorCode.description: Unique identifier for programmatic error handling.

details.description: Additional context returned in non-production environments.

Stores.description: Stores this campaign applies to with campaign start time in Utc

OrdersBeforeReceivingVoucher.description: Number of orders customer needs to make, before receiving voucher

RoundingStrategy.description: Controls how the loyalty voucher's amount is rounded

ShouldIncludeOrdersWithLoyaltyVoucher.description: Controls whether we should include orders with loyalty vouchers in the campaign calculation

VoucherValidPeriodDays.description: Number of days for which the voucher will be valid.

IncludeExistingOrders.description: Campaign will apply to existing orders

StoreIds.description: Ids of stores this campaign applies to

AppId.description: The app that this campaign belongs to.

ForceDiscount.description: Controls whether the voucher generated from this campaign will override discount exclusions

MaxDiscountAmount.description:
The maximum amount that the percentage discount value can be.
If not set then there is no maximum.
If set to e.g. 20 euro, and the percentage discount is 25%, and the order total is 100 euro, then the discount will be 20 euro (not 25 euro).

MenuItemPublicId.description: The public id of the menu item that will be awarded

PromotionAwards.description: The items that this promotion will award

ScheduledTime.description: UTC Time at which to send the push notification

Stores.description: Stores this campaign applies to with campaign start time in Utc

NotifyCustomerAfterMinutes.description: Time in minutes, after which customer will receive retention voucher if he/she does not order

LumpDiscountAmount.description: Discount amount in sum of money

VoucherValidPeriodDays.description: Number of days for which the voucher will be valid.

IncludeExistingOrders.description: Campaign will apply to existing orders

StoreIds.description: Ids of stores this campaign applies to

AppId.description: The app that this campaign belongs to.

ForceDiscount.description: Controls whether the voucher generated from this campaign will override discount exclusions

SetVoucherValidityPeriodsSimplifiedReque.description: Set the validity periods of a voucher.

DaysOfWeek.description: Days of week when the voucher is valid

StartTime.description: Start time of the day when the voucher is valid

EndTime.description:
End time of the day when the voucher is valid.
If the end time is before the start time, the end time is assumed to be the next day.

PromotionName.description: The updated name of the promotion

PromotionAwardMenuItemPublicIds.description: The updated menu items that the promotion awards

Stores.description: Stores that this voucher applies to

ValidOnOrdersOver.description: Valid on orders on or above

IsValidForOrdersPayedByCash.description: Valid for orders payed in cash

IsValidForFirstOrderOnly.description: Valid only on the first order by the customer

IsValidOnlyOnce.description: Valid only once, by any customer (once used cannot be used again by any other customer)

IsDiscoverable.description: Enables the voucher to be offered in the Voucher Discoverability feature

ForceDiscount.description: Force the discount to be applied which bypasses some menu restrictions

ChannelRestrictions.description: Limit the channels this voucher can be used on

ValidityPeriods.description:
Periods in which the voucher is valid.
An empty list means the voucher is valid at all times.
When updating the voucher, if this is set to null, the validity periods won't be updated.

MaxRedemptions.description: Maximum number of times the voucher can be redeemed (used)

IsUsed.description: Flag indicating whether the voucher is used

UsedByCustomerId.description: Indicates Customer that used the voucher.

TransactionKey.description:
An opaque string, to ensure idempotency. This allows for safely retrying requests without accidentally performing the same stamp operation twice. 
This will typically contain the the ID of the sale order.

VoucherDataPoint.description: A single data point in timeline graphs related to Vouchers

PeriodStart.description: Date from which the data point starts

PeriodLengthInDays.description: The length in days that this data point covers

Value.description: The value of this data point

StoreNames.description: Store names associated with this voucher

IsAvailableOnAllStores.description: True if the voucher is available on all active stores in the app

TotalUsed.description: Total times the voucher was used

TotalCustomers.description: Total amount of customers who used this voucher

TotalAmountFromOrders.description: Total amount of money from orders

TotalDiscounted.description: Total amount of money given away

oauth2.description: OAuth 2.0. Implicit grant for first-party portal apps; client credentials grant for server-to-server App Store apps (exchange Client ID + Secret Key for a bearer access token).
